compliance_notes: Missing lifecycle policy. Raw clickstream events stored indefinitely. analytics-service v2.4 (deployed 2026-05-03) removed the 7-day TTL prefix filter. Storage doubled in 27 days. Violates storage governance policy section 4.2. See INC-2026-031.
No transition rule to IA tier despite objects older than 90 days existing. Policy requires transition at 60 days.

No lifecycle policy. Objects accumulating since January 2023. Growing at ~11% per month. Last bulk access was 2026-02-14 (compliance audit). Versioning disabled — cannot recover deleted objects. Violates policy sections 4.1 and 4.3.
IA objects predate any formal tiering — no automated rule created them. Likely manually transitioned during 2025-Q3 cost review. No expiry policy.

lifecycle_rules_summary: Transition to IT after 30 days; expire non-current versions after 90 days; abort incomplete multipart uploads after 7 days
compliance_notes: Compliant. Lifecycle policy active and enforced. Versioning enabled. Intelligent-Tiering reduces cost on objects not accessed within 30 days (est. 42% of objects in archive tier).
